Title: Dagu affected by unauthenticated RCE via inline DAG spec in default configuration
Description: Dagu's default configuration ships with authentication disabled. The `POST /api/v2/dag-runs` endpoint accepts an inline YAML spec and executes its shell commands immediately with no credentials required — any dagu instance reachable over the network is fully compromised by default.
Solution: Unfortunately, there is no solution available yet.
